zh.lifeSummary: 當Richilda Ramberti於大約1270年出生在義大利隆巴迪亞布雷西亞時，她的父親Ramberto Ramberti, podestà di Modena18歲，母親Margherita di Almerico dei Lavellongo18歲。她於1290年之前與Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1319年在義大利隆巴迪亞曼托瓦曼托瓦享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richilda Ramberti于大约1270年出生在意大利隆巴迪亞布雷西亞时，她的父亲Ramberto Ramberti, podestà di Modena18岁，母亲Margherita di Almerico dei Lavellongo18岁。她于1290年之前与Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1319年在意大利隆巴迪亞曼托瓦曼托瓦享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ramberti
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Gaetano, Luciano, Amedeo, Angelo, Biagio, Domenic, Donato, Enrico, Gino, Iolanda.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Lamberto, an equivalent of Lambert . This surname is also found in Corsica and southern France.
German and Dutch: Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from the personal name   Lambert  , using the genitive of its Latinized form   Lambertus  .

variants.name: Lambert
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Dutch, German, Polish, Czech, and Slovak: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements land ‘land, territory’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. In England, the native Old English form Landbeorht was replaced by Lambert, the Continental form of the name that was taken to England by the Normans from France. The name gained wider currency in Britain in the Middle Ages with the immigration of weavers from Flanders, among whom Saint Lambert or Lamprecht, bishop of Maastricht in around 700, was a popular cult figure. In Italy the name was popularized in the Middle Ages as a result of the fame of Lambert I and II, Dukes of Spoleto and Holy Roman Emperors. Lambert is the second most frequent surname in Wallonia. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, for example Slovenian Lampret and Lampreht (see also Lampert ).

History: Aubin Lambert dit Champagne from Tourouvre in Orne, France, married Élisabeth Aubert in Quebec City, QC, in 1670; see also Champagne . Eustache Lambert from Boulogne-sur-Mer in Pas-de-Calais, France, married Marie Laurence in France c. 1656, died in Quebec City, QC, in 1673. Pierre Lambert from Fourmetot in Eure, France, married Marie Normand in Quebec City, QC, in 1680. Augustin Hébert dit Lambert, a descendant of Augustin Hébert from Paris, France, married Françoise Petit in Varennes, QC, in 1761. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

en.lifeSummary: When Richilda Ramberti was born about 1270, in Brescia, Lombardy, Italy, her father, Ramberto Ramberti, podestà di Modena, was 18 and her mother, Margherita di Almerico dei Lavellongo, was 18. She married Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga before 1290. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1319, in Mantova, Mantova, Lombardy, Italy, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richilda Ramberti est née environ 1270, à Brescia, Lombardia, Italie, son père, Ramberto Ramberti, podestà di Modena, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Margherita di Almerico dei Lavellongo, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga avant 1290. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1319, à Mantova, Mantova, Lombardia, Italie, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richilda Ramberti um 1270 in Brescia, Lombardei, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ramberto Ramberti, podestà di Modena 18 und ihre Mutter Margherita di Almerico dei Lavellongo 18. Sie hat vor 1290 Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1319 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Mantova, Mantova, Lombardei, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richilda Ramberti è nata il circa 1270 nel Brescia, Lombardia, Italia, sua padre, Ramberto Ramberti, podestà di Modena, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Margherita di Almerico dei Lavellongo, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga prima del 1290. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1319, nel Mantova, Mantova, Lombardia, Italia, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richilda Rambertiが約1270年にイタリアロンバーディアブレスシアで生まれた時，父Ramberto Ramberti, podestà di Modenaは18歳，母Margherita di Almerico dei Lavellongoは18歳であった。1290年以前にLuigi I Corradi da Gonzagaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1319年にイタリアロンバーディアマントヴァマントヴァで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richilda Ramberti(이)가 대략 1270년 이탈리아 롬바디아 브레스샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ramberto Ramberti, podestà di Modena(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margherita di Almerico dei Lavellongo(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1290년 이전 Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1319년 이탈리아 롬바디아 먼토바 먼토바에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richilda Ramberti nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Brescia, Lombardia, Itália, seu pai, Ramberto Ramberti, podestà di Modena, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Margherita di Almerico dei Lavellongo, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga antes 1290. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1319, em Mantova, Mantova, Lombardia, Itália, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richilda Ramberti родилась около 1270 г. в местности бресся, ломбардя, Италия, её отцу по имени Ramberto Ramberti, podestà di Modena было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margherita di Almerico dei Lavellongo, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga перед 1290 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1319 г. в местности мантова, мантова, ломбардя, Италия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richilda Ramberti nació aproximadamente 1270, en Brescia, Lombardia, Italia, su papá, Ramberto Ramberti, podestà di Modena, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Margherita di Almerico dei Lavellongo, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Luigi I Corradi da Gonzaga antes de 1290. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1319, en Mantova, Mantova, Lombardia, Italia, a la edad de 50 años.
